title: Marbella Private Boat Hire Wedding Costs & Guide 2026
html:
For a wedding celebration on the Mediterranean, nothing compares to chartering a private yacht from Puerto Banús. With prices for a six-hour crewed charter starting from around EUR 3,500 for a party of twelve, BoatHire24 connects you with verified operators offering skippered charters in Marbella that can be tailored to your special day.

Where to set off in Marbella

Puerto Banús is the principal marina for luxury yacht charters in Marbella, with direct access to the open sea. Nearby options include Marina La Bajadilla in Marbella town and the smaller Club de Mar in Estepona to the west. For a more secluded departure, consider Cabopino Marina near Artola Dunes or the port of Sotogrande further south. Each departure point gives you quick access to coves such as Cala de la Leche or the waters off the Costa del Sol. You can skippered charters in Marbella for your chosen dates.

Which boat to rent for a wedding

  1. Motor yacht (12, 20 guests) best for maximum comfort and onboard catering, from EUR 3,500 for six hours.
  2. Sailing catamaran (up to 30 guests) ideal for larger parties and stable cruising, from EUR 4,200 for a full-day charter.
  3. Luxury superyacht (20, 50 guests) suited for a grand ceremony with a dedicated crew, from EUR 8,000 for eight hours.
  4. Rib or day cruiser (6, 10 guests) an intimate choice for a small elopement, from EUR 1,800 for three hours.

How much does it cost to rent a boat for a wedding in Marbella?

Typical charter costs range from EUR 1,500 for a small shared tour to EUR 10,000 for a crewed superyacht. The price includes the vessel, crew, fuel, and basic insurance but often excludes catering and decorations. One option worth a look is the Fairline Targa 43 charter page.

  • Shared sunset tour per person: from EUR 90.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 guests): from EUR 1,500.
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 30 guests): from EUR 4,200.
  • Crewed yacht with skipper and steward (12 guests, 6 hours): from EUR 3,500.

For a comprehensive comparison of available yachts, browse the Fairline Targa 43 charter page, which features a popular wedding vessel moored at Puerto Banús. If you own a boat, you can become a host and earn from spare days.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

For bareboat charters without a skipper, a valid ICC or equivalent is required for non-residents. However, most wedding charters include a licensed skipper as standard. The operator will confirm exact requirements when you book. In high season from June to September, the Ponente wind typically blows gently from the west, making afternoon cruises calm and enjoyable.

Book your wedding charter midweek or in May or October to enjoy fewer crowds and lower rates, while still benefiting from long sunny days on the Costa del Sol.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 1,500 to EUR 10,000
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 3 to 8 hours
  • Guest capacity: 6 to 50 guests
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can we hold the wedding ceremony on the boat?

Yes, many yachts licensed for civil ceremonies allow the captain to solemnise your marriage while at anchor in Spanish waters, though you must ensure the marriage is legally recognised in your home country.

What happens if the weather is bad on the day?

Most charter operators offer a flexible rescheduling policy or a full refund if the captain deems conditions unsafe, which is standard for Mediterranean bookings.

Is it possible to have catering and a wedding cake on board?

Catering is almost always available as an add-on, and many boats have a full galley where the crew can serve a sit-down meal or a buffet including a wedding cake.

Can we decorate the yacht for the wedding?

Yes, most operators allow decorations such as flowers, bunting, and lighting, provided they do not damage the surfaces and are removed after the charter.

BoatHire24 simplifies planning your wedding aboard a private yacht in Marbella by connecting you with verified boats and owners. If you own a suitable vessel, you can become a host and list your boat to earn from weddings and events. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
